Client Onboarding
Questionnaire
Help us tell your story the right way.
Client Name
Company
Date
Referred By
Welcome, and thank you for choosing How It's Filmed. This questionnaire helps us understand your brand, your goals, and what success looks like for your project. The more detail you share, the better your final video will be. There are no wrong answers — just tell us what's true for you.
01
About You & Your Brand
Tell us who you are and what makes your business unique.
Contact & Business Info Required
Full Name
Business / Brand Name
Email Address
Phone Number
Website
Primary Social
What does your business do? Who do you serve? Required
What makes you different from competitors? Optional but valuable
How would you describe your brand's tone and personality?
Professional Authentic Bold / Confident Warm / Approachable Premium / Luxury Educational Playful / Fun Raw / Unfiltered Minimalist Inspirational Technical / Expert Community-Driven
02
Project Goals
What do you want this video to accomplish?
What type of video(s) are you looking for? Required
Brand Film Product Video Interview / Testimonial Social Content (Reels / TikTok) Event Coverage TV / Commercial YouTube / Long-Form Documentary / Mini-Doc Real Estate / Architecture Training / Educational Other
What is the primary goal of this video? Required
Brand Awareness Generate Leads Drive Sales Build Trust / Credibility Launch a Product / Service Grow Social Following Educate Audience Internal / Team Use
What does a successful outcome look like to you?
Who is the target audience for this video?
03
Creative Direction & Style
Help us understand your visual language.
Share 2–3 videos you love and describe what you like about them
Reference Link 1
What you like about it
Reference Link 2
What you like about it
Reference Link 3
What you like about it
Brand color palette — primary colors
Primary Color
Secondary Color
Accent Color
Describe the feeling your audience should have after watching
Is there anything you DON'T want in this video?
04
Timeline & Logistics
When do you need it and what's involved?
Shoot date preference & deadline
Ideal Shoot Date
Hard Deadline
Flexibility
Location(s) in mind?
Will there be people on camera? Required
Yes — myself / my team Yes — hired talent needed No — product only No — B-roll / atmosphere only Combination of the above
Where will this video be distributed?
Instagram / Reels Website / Landing Page YouTube TikTok LinkedIn Paid Ads (Meta / Google) Email Marketing Broadcast / TV Internal / Private
05
Budget & Investment
Understanding budget helps us scope the right package for you.
What is your approximate budget range? Required
Under $2K Entry level
$2K–$5K Core package
$5K–$15K Signature project
$15K+ Full campaign
Have you worked with a professional videographer before?
No — first time Yes — 1-2 times Yes — regularly We have an in-house team
Anything else we should know before our first call?
06
How Did You Find Us?
Helps us understand where our community comes from.
Where did you first discover How It's Filmed?
Instagram
YouTube
TikTok
Personal Referral
Google Search
LinkedIn
Podcast / Interview
Whop / Digital Product
Event / Conference
Other
Referred by name (if applicable)
Specific post, video, or content that led you here?
📬
You're all set.
Once you've filled this out, send it back to Brian via email or print to PDF and attach it to your message. We'll review everything before your first call so we can hit the ground running.
Or email completed form to: brian@howitsfilmed.com

Client Onboarding · Confidential
